problem: Verify tier 4 inference endpoint fallback mechanism works when no per-ticket endpoint is set and no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY exists.

Test directory pattern for integration tests (*.spec.ts)
Example of unit test patterns (*.test.ts co-located with source)

No Anthropic SDK (@anthropic-ai/sdk or anthropic) is installed in any repository

facts.fact: No tier 4 fallback logic currently exists in the codebase

example-client has no test framework configured

facts.fact: example-server has no test framework configured
